overlay.autoSwitchTitle: Hide config window and switch to game?
overlay.autoSwitchDesc: After starting the overlay, the config window will be hidden and focus will switch to the target game window. You can restore it from the tray.

overlaySettings.fullscreenOverlayHint: Cover the entire screen, not following the target window position
overlaySettings.windowModeHint: Cover only the target window client area
overlaySettings.liveDragPreviewHint: When off, the crosshair is hidden during window drag and restored 1200ms after dragging stops

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: More settings will be added in future versions.
settings.autoSwitch: Switch to game on overlay start
settings.autoSwitchHint: Hide config window and focus the target window
settings.gpuAccelerationHint: Disabling saves ~60MB of memory, takes effect after reopening the window
settings.gpuRestartDesc: GPU acceleration requires an app restart to take effect. Restart now?

about.title: About Peregrine
about.description: Peregrine is a desktop tool focused on reducing 3D motion sickness. It provides customizable visual anchors (such as crosshairs, border frames, edge arrows) on your screen to help you keep visual stability during fast camera turns or complex scenes, easing nausea and dizziness caused by vestibular-visual conflict. So you can play games like Half-Life 2, Mirror's Edge, Dying Light, and No Man's Sky that tend to trigger motion sickness.

fields.lineWidthAuto: Line width (used when radius is auto)
